nasb.text: Behold, this day your eyes have seen that the Lord had given you today into my hand in the cave, and some said to kill you, but my eye had pity on you; and I said, ‘I will not stretch out my hand against my lord, for he is the Lord’s anointed.’

esv.text: Behold, this day your eyes have seen how the Lord gave you today into my hand in the cave. And some told me to kill you, but I spared you. I said, ‘I will not put out my hand against my lord, for he is the Lord’s anointed.’

cnv.text: 現在你親眼看到，今天耶和華在山洞裡，把你交在我手裡。有人叫我殺你，我卻愛惜你。我說：‘我不敢下手傷害我主，因為他是耶和華的受膏者。’

ccb.text: 你现在亲眼看见了，刚才在山洞里，耶和华把你交在我手中，有人叫我杀你，我却不肯，因为你是耶和华所膏立的王，我不会动手伤害你。
